suppress.notes: False positive for Java artifact io.opentelemetry.semconv:opentelemetry-semconv@1.41.1. CVE-2026-39882 and CVE-2026-39883 target OpenTelemetry-Go packages go.opentelemetry.io/otel/exporters/otlp/otlptrace/otlptracehttp and go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk. Keep the suppression narrow to the exact Maven package URL and CVEs so unrelated OpenTelemetry findings still fail CI.
